spec.description: Metrics, logs and traces emitted by the openlit_demo Python app.

spec.title: LLM Requests
spec.description: Total chat completion requests over the selected time range.

spec.title: Spans Emitted
spec.description: Total OpenTelemetry spans started — covers the workflow root, chat completions, tool execution and HTTP fetches.

spec.title: Input Tokens
spec.description: Total prompt (input) tokens consumed over the selected range.

spec.title: Output Tokens
spec.description: Total completion (output) tokens generated over the selected range.

spec.title: Total Cost
spec.description: Estimated cost (USD) of GenAI usage over the selected range, as priced by OpenLIT's pricing table.

spec.title: Avg LLM Request Duration
spec.description: Average duration (s) of LLM chat completion calls.

spec.title: Request Rate by Model
spec.description: Per-second requests rate, broken down by model.

spec.title: LLM Duration P50 / P95
spec.description: P50 and P95 of chat completion duration, by model.

spec.title: Token Usage Rate (input vs output)
spec.description: Token throughput by direction. Input = prompt tokens sent to the model; output = completion tokens returned.

spec.title: Cost Rate
spec.description: Estimated cost rate (USD/s) over time, broken down by model.

spec.title: Inference Event Volume
spec.description:
Number of GenAI inference events logged per interval, by model. 

Powered by VictoriaLogs.

spec.title: Recent Inferences
spec.description: Most recent inference events. Expand a row to see the full prompt/response in `gen_ai.output.messages`.

spec.title: Cost 5m Burn Rate
spec.description: Estimated cost (USD) of GenAI usage over the selected range.

spec.title: Tokens used per request (p50)
spec.description: Shows the p50 of tokens user per LLM request.

spec.title: OpenLIT Demo · GenAI Observability
